archetype: Organic & Earthy with Vibrant Play Accents
brand: BO - Health, Wellness, and Nutrition App

patterns.micro_interaction: Scale down to 0.95 on press-in using useAnimatedStyle.
patterns.page_entrance: Fade in and slide up (Y: 20 to 0) using withSpring.
patterns.progress_rings: Animate strokeDashoffset using withTiming for circular progress.
patterns.staggered_list: Delay list item entrance by index * 100ms.
patterns.tab_bar: Floating pill bar with sliding indicator and center pop animation.

components_instructions.cards: Remove ALL #F5F5F5 grey backgrounds. Use brand/accent surface tints (e.g., #FFF7ED for nutrition) with soft shadow 'md' and border radius 'lg'. Include absolute positioned glowing gradient blobs behind content.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons should use the BO Green to Lime gradient. Fully rounded (pill shape). Use scale micro-animations.
components_instructions.glass_morphism: For AI chat bubbles and tab bar: Use React Native's blur view (if expo-blur available) or absolute positioned semi-transparent background (rgba 255,255,255,0.8) with thin 1px border (#FFFFFF 50% opacity).
components_instructions.inputs: Minimal lines or soft tinted backgrounds. Focus state shifts border to BO Green.
components_instructions.progress_rings: Use SVG circles with react-native-reanimated for smooth progress filling. Layer multiple rings for calories/water.

image_urls.description: Fresh salad bowl for smart menu cards
Spinach salmon salad for diet plans
Woman running by the ocean for fitness module

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native app. DO NOT use HTML, CSS, Tailwind, or Shadcn components.
Use standard React Native components: View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, StyleSheet.
Use react-native-reanimated for all animations mentioned in the guidelines.
CRITICAL: ALL interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and key informational texts MUST include a data-testid property (e.g. data-testid='login-button', data-testid='water-progress').
Do not use gray (#F5F5F5) for any cards or surfaces. Rely on the tinted surface colors defined in 'colors.accents' and 'colors.surfaces' instead.
Implement the UI directly using pure JavaScript and StyleSheet.create().
